pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 9 (FNAME='Martha'), confirmed in generated document content
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 11 (DOB='1958-07-22'), also appears in generated document line 39
Code analysis: setup_task.sh lines 28-30 construct this path (DOC_DIR and DOC_PATH variables)

Code analysis: setup_task.sh lines 35-66 document content contains: 'CARDIOLOGY CONSULTATION REPORT' (lines 36), 'Dr. Raj Patel, MD, FRCPC' (line 41). All three keywords present in generated document.
Code analysis: setup_oscar.sh line 217 and task description; standard OSCAR EMR user

Code analysis: setup_oscar.sh line 217 explicitly configures password to 'oscar' via SHA-1 hash (line 210). Note: Default OSCAR EMR password is 'mac2002', but this task environment custom-sets it to 'oscar'.
Code analysis: setup_oscar.sh line 217; Web search confirms 1117 is standard OSCAR EMR PIN across documentation

privileged_info_summary: Patient Martha Thompson (DOB 1958-07-22) has a cardiology consultation report (cardiology_consult_thompson.pdf) uploaded by Dr. Raj Patel. The document contains keywords 'Cardiology', 'Consult', and 'Patel'. Login credentials for the OSCAR EMR system are oscardoc/oscar/1117. All data is synthetic and generated by the task setup scripts.
